events.title: Dance of the Dragonfly
events.description: Each Wednesday evening at Dragonfly Village, Emmalee Bevan and Ritual Beats hold space for a somatic dance ritual that moves from guided embodiment into free ecstatic flow — the bamboo-and-jungle setting doing as much of the work as the music. The July 23 edition launches an expanded format: the dance opens the evening, and the sauna, saltwater pool, and fire circle keep it alive afterward, letting the nervous system unwind the rest of the way. KITAS rate IDR 150,000; visitor rate 200,000. The post-dance sauna + pool + fire circle add-on is IDR 80,000.
events.short_description: Weekly somatic dance ritual at Dragonfly Village, expanding from Jul 23 to include sauna, saltwater pool, and fire circle. Led by Emmalee Bevan & Ritual Beats.
events.price_info: IDR 150,000 (KITAS) / IDR 200,000 (visitors); +IDR 80,000 for sauna, saltwater pool & fire circle

events.title: Shamanic Breathwork Immersion with Levi Banner
events.description: Levi Banner has held ceremonial space in Bali since 2013 — monthly new moon cacao ceremonies, elemental ecstatic dance — but this August 30 session at Yoga Barn moves into different territory: shamanic breathwork, a guided journey using conscious connected breathing to release, open, and catalyse direct experience. Single-day community format. No multi-day curriculum, no certification framing — just the medicine of the breath and a decade of ceremonial presence behind it. Price and exact start time not yet confirmed on Megatix.
events.short_description: Levi Banner brings a single-day shamanic breathwork ceremony to Yoga Barn on Aug 30. Cacao ceremonialist and Shamanic Astrologer with 10+ years holding space in Bali.
events.venue_address: Jl. Hanoman, Padangtegal, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali 80571
